metadata.title: Osteóplus | Osteopathy and rehabilitation in Barcelona
metadata.description: Book your visit and follow your recovery with clear, kind, accessible guidance.

offline.title: You are offline right now
offline.body: You can try again when your connection returns. If you need to talk to the clinic, call +34 93 123 45 67.

header.homeAria: Go to the Osteóplus home page

hero.body: Specialized osteopathy, physiotherapy, and rehabilitation treatments for all ages. Book your first consultation with a clear path and no commitment.

services.title: Specialized and prevention care
services.body: Personalized treatments for every stage of life, from acute pain relief to long-term prevention.

items.title: Osteopathy
items.body: Manual support for muscle discomfort, limited mobility, and postural care with gentle techniques.

items.title: Physiotherapy
items.body: Sessions to rebuild strength, reduce pain, and follow a plan fitted to your recovery stage.

items.title: Rehabilitation
items.body: Progressive guidance after an injury, surgery, or a period of lower activity, with clear goals.

team.title: Our close team
team.body: The Osteóplus team brings clinical experience and human care together so every visit has a clear direction.

testimonials.title: What our patients say
testimonials.body: Our patients' trust is our greatest achievement.

items.quote: At 72, I was worried about using a health website, but Osteóplus gave me clear steps to book my appointment. The team was attentive and very professional.
items.name: Pilar G.

about.body: At Osteóplus we combine clinical expertise with accessible technology to deliver personalized care. Our team works so your recovery feels comfortable, clear, and effective.

subscribe.title: Subscribe to our newsletter
subscribe.body: Receive health tips and clinic news directly in your inbox.
subscribe.label: Email address
subscribe.helper: Subscription will be available after legal validation. We will never share your data with third parties.
subscribe.success: Thank you. We have registered your interest in the newsletter.
subscribe.invalid: Check the email address and try again.

footer.description: Osteopathy, physiotherapy, and rehabilitation, accessible in Barcelona.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to manage your appointments and recovery.

signup.title: Create account
signup.description: Create your account to manage your appointments and follow your rehabilitation.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If the email matches an existing account, you will receive a password reset link.

privacy.healthConsent: I consent to my health data being processed to manage my care at Osteóplus.
privacy.terms: I accept the terms of use
privacy.marketing: I would like to receive health tips and updates (optional)
privacy.marketingHelper: You can unsubscribe at any time from settings.
privacy.gdpr: Your data is protected under GDPR.

errors.emailInvalid: The email format is not valid.
errors.passwordMin: The password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.fullNameMin: The name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.healthConsentRequired: We need your consent to process your health data.
errors.termsRequired: You must accept the terms of use.
errors.loginFailed: We could not sign you in. Check your details or try again.
errors.signupFailed: We could not create the account. Try again or call +34 93 123 45 67.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Try again or call +34 93 123 45 67.

services.osteoGeneralDesc: Assessment and manual treatment for musculoskeletal discomfort.
services.physioRecoveryDesc: Sessions to rebuild strength and mobility after injury or rest.
services.osteoCranialDesc: Gentle techniques for headaches, jaw, and neck tension.
services.physioSportDesc: Recovery and prevention of sports injuries.

common.offlineError: No connection. Try again or call +34 93 123 45 67.

booking.title: Book your appointment
booking.metaDescription: Book your osteopathy, physiotherapy, or rehabilitation appointment at Osteóplus Barcelona.

step3.subtitle: Step 3 of 3: confirm and complete your details

anyPractitioner.body: We will assign the next available specialist.

calendar.noSlotsBody: No times available for this date. Try another day or call the clinic.

confirmation.title: Appointment confirmed
confirmation.subtitle: Your booking has been registered successfully.
confirmation.paymentNote: Payment is made at the clinic on the day of your appointment.
confirmation.help: Need to change or cancel? You can do so up to 24 hours in advance by calling +34 93 123 45 67.

empty.title: No appointments yet
empty.body: Book your first visit and start your journey to better health.

detail.policy: You can reschedule or cancel your appointment up to 24 hours in advance.

entry.phoneHelp: If you need help with your account, call +34 93 123 45 67.

privacy.title: Privacy and security
privacy.description: Manage your account, security, and data.

security.title: Security
security.twoFactorDescription: Add an extra layer of protection to your account.
security.sessionAlertsDescription: Get notified when you sign in from a new device.

data.title: Your data
data.description: You can download a copy of your data or request account deletion. For more information, see our privacy policy.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose how and when you receive alerts.

channels.title: Channels
channels.emailDescription: Appointment confirmations and reminders by email.

frequency.title: Summary frequency
frequency.immediatelyDescription: Receive each alert as it happens.
frequency.dailyDescription: One summary with all alerts from the day.
frequency.weeklyDescription: One summary with all alerts from the week.

reminders.label: Appointment reminders
reminders.description: Get a reminder 24 hours before your next appointment.
